title: Kenyan-Style Grilled Veal Chops
description: A flavorful and lean dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring marinated grilled veal chops served with a side of cheesy goodness.

ingredients.name: kenyan spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: cheese
ingredients.notes: grated parmesan or cheddar work well

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together kenyan spice blend, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, and salt.
Place veal chops in a large zip-top bag or a shallow dish.
Pour marinade over veal chops, turning to coat evenly.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Remove veal chops from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill veal chops for 4-6 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Transfer veal chops to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
While veal chops are grilling, heat cheese in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring until melted and smooth.
Serve grilled veal chops with melted cheese spooned over the top.
